# Note pointing in

This note lives at the fixture root. It links into the trailing-dot folder.

The link below targets `target-inside.md` which lives inside `030_Systems - reference material.`. A skill that cannot enumerate the trailing-dot folder will fail to find `target-inside.md`, and any rename of that target will leave this wikilink broken.

See: [[target-inside]]
